content: 'LIL HERB' DELUXE OUT NOW ⏳: https://gherbo.lnk.to/lilherblilheroin STREAM "WHATEVER U WANT": https://gherbo.lnk.to/WUW STREAM "REASON": https://gherbo.lnk.to/Reason STREAM 'WENT LEGIT' 🌏♻️: http://GHerbo.lnk.to/WentL Subscribe to G Herbo's official channel for exclusive music videos & behind the scenes footage: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-GHerbo More G Herbo: https://fb.com/gherbomusic http://twitter.com/gherbo https://instagram.com/nolimitherbo https://www.tiktok.com/@gherbo https://soundcloud.com/gherbo http://spoti.fi/1LwQTBk http://gherbomusic.com #LILHERB #GHERBO I chose rap to explain all this pain I done felt I was huntin' deep with gang, but now I hang by myself I ain't get no fuckin' help, I made a name by myself If it's up, then I'ma up it ain't flame by myself Am I wrong to be selfish? Every time somebody hit my line, I gotta sell 'em Well, my flowers, I don't smell 'em Niggas I came up with had love 'fore they turned jealous Tried to turn the other cheek, 'cause if they tweaked, then I'ma Nella All the energy be fake rats and snakes, I seen hella All the times Swerve shoulda heard a thank you, they ain't tell him And this feel be so real, I could spit it acapella I went through the same shit as Hov and Thang with Rockefeller I was standin' in the rain with no umbrella Battle scars, I got trauma that's gon' follow me forever He deceivin', but I ain't one to leave, that's my mella Gotta watch my own back, give my respect, it's now or never And who gon' ride? What you gon' decide? Promises gon' come in time Who gon' fold the pressure? Who gon' put it on the line? (Nobody) When it ain't no food left, then who gon' go and grind? (Nobody) When it's life or death, then who gon' pull a homicide? When them invoices comin', who gon' pay the fine? (Huh?) Who gon' be there when it's BM and it's kids cryin'? (Huh?) Who gon' up and go and who gon' put in overtime? 'Cause I'ma do the show and still be on go for mine Yeah, I'ma run up tickets, take the risk every time I'm gon' get richer and uplift my niggas airtime I was front and center when my broski mama died I still remember who ain't hit me when my pops died (Fuck 'em) I don't know who these niggas is, but they not mine This Off The Top and you can stop me when I start lyin' Live in the hills, but I got the same state of mind I'm still grippin' on my steel, let the stop sign (you know that) I'm still clappin', my reaction if it shots fire (you know that) I'm still hoppin' right in traffic if it got live (you know that) I'm still paranoid and frantic when I'm not high I'm still snappin' and relaxin' 'til I'm top five (Top five, top five, top five, top five, top five) Each time we meet, love I find complete love Tell me, tell me you love me only And I know you love me
chineseContent: “LIL HERB”豪华版现已推出⏳：https://gherbo.lnk.to/lilherblilheroin STREAM“无论你想要什么”：https://gherbo.lnk.to/WUW STREAM“REASON”：https://gherbo.lnk.to/Reason STREAM“合法”🌏♻️： http://GHerbo.lnk.to/WentL 订阅 G Herbo 的官方频道，观看独家音乐视频和幕后花絮：http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-GHerbo 更多 G Herbo：https://fb.com/gherbomusic http://twitter.com/gherbo https://instagram.com/nolimitherbo https://www.tiktok.com/@gherbo https://soundcloud.com/gherbo http://spoti.fi/1LwQTBk http://gherbomusic.com #LILHERB #GHERBO 我选择说唱来解释我所做的所有这些痛苦，我觉得我正在与帮派打交道，但现在我独自一人吊死，我他妈的没有任何帮助，我自己出名如果它结束了，那么我就起来了，这不是我自己的火焰我自私有错吗？每次有人碰上我的线，我就得卖掉它们 好吧，我的花，我闻不到它们 我想出的黑鬼在他们嫉妒之前就拥有了爱 试图转动另一边脸，因为如果他们调整，那么我是内拉 所有的能量都是假老鼠和蛇，我看到了海拉 所有的时间转向应该听到谢谢你，他们不会告诉他 这种感觉如此真实，我可以吐出阿卡贝拉 我去了和洛克菲勒一样，我站在雨中，没有伞，我受到了创伤，这将永远跟随我，他欺骗了我，但我不是一个可以离开的人，那是我的梅拉，要小心我自己的背后，给予我尊重，是现在，还是永远，谁会骑？你要做什么决定？承诺会及时实现 谁会承担压力？谁会把它放在线上？ （没人）当没有食物剩下时，谁去磨碎？ （没人）生死攸关时，谁来杀人？当他们收到发票时，谁来支付罚款？ （哈？）谁会是？
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
